title: parosela crenulata
intro: Parosela crenulata, also known as the horned parosela, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions of South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts have been found to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The horned parosela can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
